arts.ttl: Leicester sign defender Coulibaly in £3m deal
arts.sum: Leicester City sign French full-back Woyo Coulibaly from Parma for a reported fee of £3m.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Ruud van Nistelrooy's first Leicester City transfer confirmed
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has sealed his first signing as Leicester City manager with right-back Woyo Coulibaly joining on a four-and-a-half-year contract from Italian side Parma. The deal is a cheap one on account of Coulibaly having just six months remaining on his Parma contract.

arts.ttl: Gallery: The best photos from Leicester v Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace return to Premier League action, with our first away game of 2025 against Leicester City this evening – and here are some of the best snaps from the clash!

arts.ttl: Leicester seal their first January signing as Ruud van Nistelrooy bids to strengthen his squad for relegation fight
arts.sum: Boss Ruud van Nistelrooy had been desperate to bring in specialist competition at right-back for James Justin, who has struggled at times this season.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace confirm Trevoh Chalobah recall: What next for the Chelsea defender?
arts.sum: Crystal Palace confirm Trevoh Chalobah's departure as Chelsea exercise their option to recall the 25-year-old defender.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Crystal Palace as Conor Coady dropped
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Faes, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy. The Argentinian wins the battle with Jordan Ayew and Kasey McAteer to start two games in a row for the first time under van Nistelerooy.

arts.ttl: Team news: Five changes for Palace for Leicester trip
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made five changes to his side to face Leicester City - with Will Hughes returning from injury to take his place in midfield and Jean-Philippe Mateta back in the side.
Crystal Palace are back in Premier League action tonight, taking on Leicester City at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Chelsea recall Trevoh Chalobah from Crystal Palace loan
arts.sum: Chelsea have officially recalled Trevoh Chalobah from his loan spell at Crystal Palace . OFFICIAL: Chelsea recall Trevoh Chalobah from Crystal Palace loan

arts.ttl: Chelsea's efforts to sign Marc Guehi in the balance after Trevoh Chalobah was recalled from Crystal Palace loan spell - with the Eagles not looking to sign a replacement for the defender
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Centre back Chalobah, who signed a season-long loan deal with the Selhurst Park club in the summer, has returned to Stamford Bridge after Chelsea activated a recall clause.
